name: sync-status-center
title: 同步状态中心
description: 让账号与歌单云同步状态在桌面和手机上可见、可理解、可重试，并准确展示待同步、冲突、最近成功时间和错误，不改变本地优先边界。
scope: Cloud sync status projection, desktop/mobile settings indicators, account status center, deterministic browser coverage, documentation, release, and production smoke verification.
notes: Pages run 30028816043 attempt 2 succeeded after attempt 1 was canceled for a stuck Chromium install; live v64 status center reported synced with 0 pending and 0 conflicts.
